Northwatch Systems builds Blackridge to help teams find where AI spend is leaking. Provider bills show totals. Blackridge shows near real-time causes with workflow correlation, request-level evidence rows, attribution coverage, confidence notes, and safe tests.

The spend review is the entry motion for evaluating Blackridge fit. A work email and monthly AI spend bracket are enough to start. A founding engineer replies within 2 business days with a written assessment.
